# Chart.js vendored runtime

- Package: Chart.js
- Version: 4.5.1
- Source package: `chart.js@4.5.1` from npm / the official Chart.js release
- Runtime file: `chart.umd.min.js`
- SHA-256: `48444a82d4edcb5bec0f1965faacdde18d9c17db3063d042abada2f705c9f54a`
- License: MIT; see `LICENSE.md`

The runtime is stored locally so the GlucoScope user-data page does not execute a third-party CDN script in the same origin context as browser-stored connection details.
